name: @ctrl/pi-plugin
description: Pi (badlogic/pi-mono coding agent) wrapped as a CTRL brain keycap — exposes Pi over a local MCP server (HTTP/JSON-RPC) so Irisy and any other MCP client can call it through the standard text.chat capability.

scripts.test:chat: curl -sN -X POST http://localhost:17874/mcp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"text.chat","arguments":{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"who are you in one line"}]}}}'
